about.title: About Me
about.description: Architecting the future of AI through robust system design.

whoAmI.title: Who I Am
whoAmI.content: I am Kushal Mittal, a B.Tech graduate specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science. I describe myself as a Stackless Engineer—a problem-solver first and a technologist second. My focus isn't on any single framework but on selecting the best tools for the task, whether that's architecting a production-grade RAG engine, building parallel DAG execution pipelines, or developing seamless full-stack applications.

technicalApproach.title: My Technical Approach
technicalApproach.intro: My work is driven by a deep curiosity for system architecture and a commitment to building robust, high-performance AI-driven systems.

aiMl.title: In AI/ML
aiMl.content: , I specialize in building practical, production-ready applications using LLMs and graph-based architectures. I have extensive experience architecting RAG pipelines from scratch, implementing level-parallel execution engines, and managing complex ML lifecycles. I'm proficient in the entire AI stack—from LangChain and LangGraph for agentic workflows to vector search optimization with Elasticsearch and ChromaDB.

fullStack.title: In Full-Stack Development
fullStack.content: , I build seamless, scalable end-to-end experiences. I develop high-performance RESTful APIs with Flask and Node.js, implement robust backend logic with parallel processing, and create responsive frontends with React and Next.js. I prioritize system observability, implementing structured logging, Prometheus metrics, and secure authentication solutions.

coreStrengths.title: My Core Strengths
coreStrengths.paragraph1: Beyond technical skills, I bring a strong foundation in architectural reasoning and system design to every project. I am a proactive team collaborator who values clear communication and thrives in agile, high-stakes environments. My ability to quickly adapt to new technologies and manage complex resource constraints—like optimizing peak RAM usage for large-scale document processing—allows me to take ideas from concept to production efficiently.
coreStrengths.paragraph2: I am committed to creating impactful, data-driven solutions that bridge the gap between advanced technical research and operational business strategy.
